backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor defining types (SectionId, SectionScores, MedicalHistory, UserAnswers, SolutionTip, CompleteWellnessReport) and storage for wellness reports with validation functions for answers and section scores.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and configuration files describing their functionality and routing structure.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives defining CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space for shadcn/ui design system variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for ABL Pulse holistic wellness assessment application with meta tags and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, assessment sections (1-4), results, admin dashboard, and other pages, wrapped with AssessmentProvider for global state.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying Root Cause Healing philosophy, four core values cards with icons and hover effects, and integrated FounderProfile component.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying problems (red background) or suggestions (green background) with bilingual titles and conditional rendering of items list.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentPlaceh: Empty placeholder component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentProgre: Progress bar component showing current section (1-4) and percentage completion with animated gradient fill bar.
frontend/src/components/BasicInfoForm.ts: Form component collecting user's basic information (name, age, gender, profession, physical metrics, contact info, medical history) with validation and localStorage persistence before navigating to section 1.
frontend/src/components/CircularScoreGau: Renders a circular SVG gauge displaying a score out of a maximum value with color-coded gradients (red, amber, green) based on status category.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Footer component with brand info, quick links (including admin), WhatsApp consultation button, and social media icons.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches errors and displays a bilingual (English/Hindi) error UI with retry and reload options.
frontend/src/components/FounderProfile.t: Displays founder Dr. Suman Lal's profile with image, credentials, and mission statement in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/components/GlobalAssessment: Renders five frequency options (Never to Daily) as selectable buttons with bilingual labels for assessment questions.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Landing page hero with animated background effects, main heading, and CTAs for assessment and WhatsApp consultation.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading component with animated logo, progress bar, and bilingual loading text.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with logo, menu items (Home, Assessment, About, Contact), language toggle for assessment sections, and smooth scrolling functionality.
frontend/src/components/SectionScoreCard: Displays individual section scores with bilingual titles, status badges (Alert/Needs Work/Good), and color-coded progress bars.
frontend/src/components/ServicesGrid.tsx: Grid layout showcasing four services (Health Score Card, Webinars, 1-on-1 Support, Structured Programs) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/TipCard.tsx: A React component that displays a bilingual (English/Hindi) tip card with an icon, title, description, and expandable accordion section explaining why the tip helps.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Application-wide constants including WhatsApp consultation number, message template, app metadata, and score thresholds for section and total assessment scores.
React context provider managing assessment state including 40 question responses, current section, language preference (en/hi), and section completion/access logic with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/data/questions/en.ts: English language question data for 4 sections (12 questions total) covering sleep, diet, exercise, and mental well-being with 4 options each.
frontend/src/data/questions/hi.ts: Hindi language question data for 4 sections (12 questions total) covering sleep, diet, exercise, and mental well-being with 4 options each.
frontend/src/data/sections/section1.ts: Section 1 questions (IDs 1-10) in bilingual format covering sleep and daily routine habits like wake time, water intake, sunlight exposure, and sleep consistency.
frontend/src/data/sections/section2.ts: Section 2 questions (IDs 11-20) in bilingual format covering diet and digestion habits including meal timing, food choices, sugar intake, and digestive health.
frontend/src/data/sections/section3.ts: Section 3 questions (IDs 21-30) in bilingual format covering physical activity including walking, stretching, breathing exercises, and strength training habits.
frontend/src/data/sections/section4.ts: Section 4 questions (IDs 31-40) in bilingual format covering mental and emotional well-being including gratitude, family time, stress management, and professional guidance.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook using React Query to manage Internet Identity authentication and create backend actors with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBasicInfoStorage.t: Custom hook providing localStorage utilities for saving, retrieving, clearing, and validating basic user information (name, age, gender, profession, weight, height, WhatsApp number).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePDFDownload.ts: Custom hook for generating and downloading wellness report PDFs with loading state management and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating wellness reports, test data, and admin user status from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Tailwind configuration, OKLCH color system for brand colors, custom animations (pulse-glow, electric-wave-flow), and typography setup using Playfair Display and Montserrat fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with navigation header and placeholder content listing upcoming features like user data viewer, exports, and system configuration.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Empty file for admin login page (not yet implemented).
frontend/src/pages/AssessmentPage.tsx: Assessment page displaying the BasicInfoForm component with ABL logo and back-to-home navigation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page composing Navigation, HeroSection, ServicesGrid, AboutSection, and ContactFooter components.
frontend/src/pages/LogicCorrectionDocsPa: Documentation page providing a structured template format for submitting logic corrections and feature updates with bilingual (English/Hindi) instructions.
frontend/src/pages/RecommendedServicesPa: Displays recommended wellness services (webinars, coaching, functional readiness program) based on user assessment scores. Shows user info card with total score and status, and provides action buttons for each service.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Shows comprehensive assessment results with circular score gauge, section breakdowns, analysis cards, and action buttons for PDF download and WhatsApp consultation. Validates that all questions are answered before displaying results.
frontend/src/pages/Section1.tsx: Assessment page for Section 1 (Sleep & Hydration) with 10 questions, bilingual UI, progress bar, and navigation to Section 2 when complete.
frontend/src/pages/Section2.tsx: Assessment page for Section 2 (Gut Cleanse & Metabolic) with access guards requiring Section 1 completion, bilingual questions, and navigation between sections.
frontend/src/pages/Section3.tsx: Assessment page for Section 3 (Movement & Circulation) with guards requiring previous sections completion, displays bilingual questions about physical activity patterns.
frontend/src/pages/Section4.tsx: Final assessment section (Section 4) with completion handler that validates all 40 questions are answered, shows loading overlay during submission, and navigates to results page.
frontend/src/pages/TestModePage.tsx: Displays three test wellness profiles (healthy, moderate, serious) loaded from backend test data, showing scores, medical history, and analysis in a tabbed interface with navigation back to home.
frontend/src/pages/WellnessProfilePage.t: Renders the user's wellness profile page displaying basic info, total ABL score out of 160, and four section scores with color-coded status indicators based on assessment responses.
frontend/src/types/assessment.ts: Defines TypeScript types for assessment data including Language, BasicInfoFormData with medical history, and Question/Section structures.
frontend/src/utils/patternAnalysis.ts: Rule-based engine that analyzes low-scoring question patterns (0-3) to identify health problems and generate Ayurvedic habit suggestions in English and Hindi.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a downloadable plain text wellness report file containing user info, total score, section breakdown, problems, and habit suggestions.
frontend/src/utils/resultsSharingUtils.t: Empty utility file for results sharing functionality (no implementation present).
frontend/src/utils/scoringUtils.ts: Calculates section and total scores from assessment responses (40 questions across 4 sections), categorizes scores into alert/needsWork/optimal ranges, and provides color/label utilities.
frontend/src/utils/testDataProcessor.ts: Converts backend SectionScores into frontend display format by generating realistic question-level responses, running pattern analysis, and creating section data with status indicators.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappIntegration.t: Exports a function to open WhatsApp with a pre-filled consultation message containing the user's name and ABL score, directed to a default consultation number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, brand colors, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Montserrat), border radius variables, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project metadata for ABL Pulse wellness assessment app, documenting architecture (Motoko backend, React frontend, Internet Identity auth), pending feature requests for admin dashboard and backend documentation.
